variants.title: Donaldson P785385 Air Oil Separator | Replaces the SF Filter SAO 59510
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P785385 Air Oil Separator is designed to separate oil from compressed air systems, reducing oil carryover and improving air quality. It enhances system efficiency and protects downstream equipment. Built with durable materials, this separator ensures reliable operation in industrial and automotive applications.

variants.title: HiFi Filter OT 2051 Air/Oil Separator | Replaces the SF Filter SAO 59510
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter OT 2051 Air/Oil Separator is HiFi's replacement to the SF Filter SAO 59510. Easy to install and replace, the OT 2051 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
